Battle poses dump (attack + damage taken)
[1] mode $FF -> $00
[58] mode $00 -> $08
[91] Name entry screen
[91] mode $08 -> $A8
[717] mode $A8 -> $00
[717] Past name entry, mode=$00 — pressing A
[759] mode $00 -> $70
[824] mode $70 -> $6F
[827] mode $6F -> $70

  spr61: x=216 y=135 t=$2E a=$00
  spr62: x=208 y=143 t=$2F a=$00
  spr63: x=216 y=143 t=$30 a=$00

  pal0: $0F $36 $30 $16
